name: Shrimp Divan
recipeIngredient: Cream/celery soup (celery soup base, 10.5 oz can or 10.5 oz canned cream soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the chopped broccoli in a greased 7x11-inch baking dish.
2. Cover the broccoli with the peeled and deveined shrimp, then sprinkle with salt, pepper, and mixed herbs.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the cream/celery soup, mayonnaise, lemon juice, and shredded cheese. Stir until well blended.
4. Pour the sauce mixture evenly over the shrimp layer.
5. Top with the buttered breadcrumbs, spreading them out to cover the surface.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes, or until the breadcrumbs are golden brown and the shrimp is cooked through.
NOTE: Breadcrumbs may be made from fine dry bread, fine fresh bread, cornflake crumbs, or packaged stuffing mix, combined with about 3 tablespoons melted butter.
